---
title: "WholeBrainSalienceStats"
author: "David Estrin"
date: "2025-09-05"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(performance)
library(car)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(scico)
library(lmerTest) 
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyr)


```

```{r Activity Dataset, echo=FALSE}
volcano_df <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\listo\\communal_registration_logcal_drop\\salience_experiment\\results\\all_volcano_data.csv")

volcano_df <- volcano_df %>%
  mutate(comparison = factor(comparison, levels = c(
    "water vs vanilla",
    "water vs tmt",
    "vanilla vs tmt"
  )))


# Example: Add a column for color based on the comparison and fold change
volcano_df <- volcano_df %>%
  mutate(color_group = case_when(
    comparison == "water vs vanilla" & t_value > 0 ~ "water",
    comparison == "water vs vanilla" & t_value < 0 ~ "vanilla",
    
    comparison == "vanilla vs tmt" & t_value > 0 ~ "vanilla",
    comparison == "vanilla vs tmt" & t_value < 0 ~ "tmt",
    
    comparison == "water vs tmt" & t_value > 0 ~ "water",
    comparison == "water vs tmt" & t_value < 0 ~ "tmt"))



# Filter out any rows without a defined group
volcano_df <- volcano_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(color_group))

# Define colors
color_values <- c("water" = "#5c6bc0", "vanilla" = "#ffcc66", "tmt" = "#a83232")

# Select top regions by absolute t_value per comparison
top_regions <- volcano_df %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(t_value), n = 8) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot with labels
p <- ggplot(volcano_df, aes(x = fold_change, y = neg_log_p_value, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", stroke = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_values) +
  facet_grid(comparison ~ ., switch = "y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = " ",
    y = " "
  )

print(p)

# Save
ggsave("C:\\Users\\listo\\communal_registration_logcal_drop\\salience_experiment\\results\\volcano_plots_labeled.pdf", 
       p, width = 3, height = 9, dpi = 300)

```

```{r Activity Dataset, echo=FALSE}
topdf <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\listo\\communal_registration_logcal_drop\\salience_experiment\\results\\largestregionsbygroup.csv")
topdf$regionname<-paste(topdf$regionname,topdf$lateralization)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Define colors for each condition
condition_colors <- c("water" = "#5c6bc0",   # blue
                      "vanilla" = "#ffcc66", # yellow
                      "tmt" = "#a83232")     # red

# Loop over comparisons
for (comp in unique(topdf$comparison)) {
  
  # Figure out which groups are in this comparison
  groups <- unlist(strsplit(comp, " vs "))
  
  # Filter for one comparison at a time
  comp_df <- topdf %>%
    filter(comparison == comp) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(effects))) %>%
    mutate(regionname = factor(regionname, levels = unique(regionname)))
  
  # Reshape for bar plot
  comp_long <- comp_df %>%
    select(regionname, group1mean, group2mean, group1sem, group2sem) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(group1mean, group2mean, group1sem, group2sem),
                 names_to = c("group", ".value"),
                 names_pattern = "(group[12])(mean|sem)") %>%
    mutate(group = ifelse(group == "group1", groups[1], groups[2]))  # assign correct group names
  
  # ---- SCALE EFFECTS FOR SECOND AXIS ----
  mean_range <- range(c(comp_long$mean + comp_long$sem, comp_long$mean - comp_long$sem))
  effect_range <- range(comp_df$effects)
  
  scale_factor <- diff(mean_range) / diff(effect_range)
  offset <- mean_range[1] - effect_range[1] * scale_factor
  comp_df <- comp_df %>%
    mutate(effects_scaled = effects * scale_factor + offset)
  
  # Base plot
  p_base <- ggplot(comp_long, aes(x = regionname, y = mean, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sem, ymax = mean + sem),
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0) +
    geom_point(
      data = comp_df, aes(x = regionname, y = effects_scaled),
      shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 1,
      fill = NA, color = "green", inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors[groups]) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Mean values",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - offset) / scale_factor, name = "Effects (Cohen's d)")
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "green"),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = comp,
      x = "Region",
      fill = "Group"
    )
  
  # --- Save with x-axis labels ---
  print(p_base)
  ggsave(paste0("C:\\Users\\listo\\communal_registration_logcal_drop\\salience_experiment\\results\\volcano_barplot_", 
                gsub(" ", "_", comp), ".pdf"),
         p_base, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  
  # --- Save without x-axis labels ---
  p_no_x <- p_base + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())
  
  print(p_no_x)
  ggsave(paste0("C:\\Users\\listo\\communal_registration_logcal_drop\\salience_experiment\\results\\volcano_barplot_", 
                gsub(" ", "_", comp), "_noX.pdf"),
         p_no_x, width = 9, height = 3, dpi = 300)
}

```
